sections.subtitle: Current Form Analysis
sections.text: FC Arouca has struggled recently, with no wins in their last 3 matches (2 draws, 1 loss), scoring only 4 goals in their last 5 games. Boavista, on the other hand, has shown mixed form with 2 wins and 3 losses in their last 5 matches, conceding heavily (10 goals) while scoring just 4. Arouca's home form is slightly better, while Boavista struggles defensively on the road.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last 2 head-to-head matches, FC Arouca has dominated Boavista, winning both encounters with scores of 2-1 (home) and 3-1 (away). Arouca has been the first to score in most recent matchups and has a strong historical edge with 4 wins in the last 5 meetings.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Arouca (12th, 35 points) has outperformed Boavista (18th, 24 points) in the league, with better attacking output (31 goals vs 23) and defensive stability (48 conceded vs 55). Arouca's average possession (52.4%) and big chances created (71) suggest they control games better than Boavista.

sections.subtitle: Key Player Impact
sections.text: Arouca's Jason (5 goals, high Sofascore rating) and Henrique Araújo (5 goals) are likely to influence the game with their attacking threat. Boavista's Róbert Boženík (4 goals) and Miguel Reisinho (5 goals) need to step up, but their underperformance against expected goals could hinder their chances.

sections.subtitle: Match Context and Trends
sections.text: Matches between these teams often see over 4.5 cards (trend in 10/10 head-to-head games), influenced by the referee’s average of 5.5 yellows per game. Corners are typically under 10.5 in their matchups, aligning with both teams’ recent stats (9/10 for Arouca, 4/5 for Boavista). Arouca’s tendency to score late could be a deciding factor.
